content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type: PULL_REQUEST opened for feat/review-mouse-calm2 with changes to mouse Calm2 gene review file
b. This is a request for code review feedback on a gene annotation review
c. Key information:
   - PR adds 48 lines to genes/mouse/Calm2/Calm2-ai-review.yaml
   - This is an ISO-focused review of mouse Calm2 calmodulin annotations
   - Part of the ISO evidence code review project
   - Single file modified: genes/mouse/Calm2/Calm2-ai-review.yaml
d. Main tasks:
   - Review the YAML file for code quality and best practices
   - Check for potential bugs or issues in the gene annotation review
   - Assess adherence to the project's gene review guidelines
   - Validate against the LinkML schema if possible
e. Plan:
   - Read the modified YAML file to understand the content
   - Review against the project guidelines in CLAUDE.md
   - Check for proper formatting and structure
   - Validate the annotation decisions and evidence assessments
   - Provide constructive feedback on the review quality
f. I should be able to complete this review, though I may not be able to run the validation commands without proper setup
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: Mouse Calm2 ISO Annotations Reviewing this ISO-focused annotation review for mouse Calm2 calmodulin... #### Todo List: - [ ] Read the modified YAML file to understand the annotation review content - [ ] Check adherence to project gene review guidelines - [ ] Assess code quality and best practices for YAML structure - [ ] Review annotation decisions and evidence assessments - [ ] Check for potential bugs or formatting issues - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23331148042)
